channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dallas Cowboys make owner Jerry Jones proud after being eliminated from the playoff chase
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys were officially eliminated from the playoff contention before kicking off their game.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cowboys make clutch defensive plays to stymie Bucs, pull off win
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys' secondary came up clutch against the Atlanta Falcons on Sunday with two key turnovers in the fourth quarter. Dallas won the game, 26-24.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: O'Connell passes for 257 yards and Raiders snap 10-game skid with 19-14 win over Jaguars
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Aidan O'Connell returned from an injury and passed for 257 yards, and the Las Vegas Raiders ended a 10-game losing streak with a 19-14 victory over the Jacksonville Jaguars on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Sam Darnold's remarkable TD pass to Justin Jefferson helps Vikings edge Seahawks
item.description: Sam Darnold threw three touchdown passes, including two to Justin Jefferson, as the Minnesota Vikings topped the Seattle Seahawks on Sunday, 27-24.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Facing hometown Canucks 'a bit surreal' for Sharks rookie Macklin Celebrini
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — Macklin Celebrini grew up dreaming about playing NHL hockey at Rogers Arena. On Monday night, that dream will become a reality. “Skating here when I was younger, I kind of tried to put myself in an NHL player’s situation or shoes, and pretend to be them.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes as Lions beat Bears 34-17 for franchise-record 13th win
item.description: Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions locked in from the start and delivered a bounce-back performance. It came with a few team records, too.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jalen Hurts leaves with a concussion as the Eagles' winning streak ends at 10
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — Jalen Hurts was concussed minutes into the game and ruled out after evaluation, Kenny Pickett played like a backup quarterback and the Philadelphia Eagles' winning streak is over.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Penix wins debut as Atlanta QB as Falcons return two picks for TDs, beat hapless Giants 34-7
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Michael Penix Jr. felt a brief bit of apprehension as he ran down the tunnel, which was to be expected. Then he played like a veteran for the Atlanta Falcons.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rangers forward Matt Rempe suspended for eight games for elbow on Heiskanen
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York Rangers forward Matt Rempe was suspended for eight games by NHL’s Department of Player Safety on Sunday for boarding and elbowing Dallas Stars defenseman Miro Heiskanen on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: ALLAN KREDA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Magic center Moritz Wagner will miss remainder of season with torn ACL in left knee
item.description: Orlando center Moritz Wagner will miss the remainder of the season with a torn ACL in his left knee, that news coming to the injury-riddled Magic one day after they pulled off one of the more improbable wins in franchise history. Wagner underwent an MRI exam on Sunday to confirm the tear.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College Football Playoffs looks for good matchups after snoozy first round of blowouts
item.description: For those who dozed through it, or flipped to more compelling fare in the NFL, here's a brief recap of the rollout of the much-anticipated College Football Playoff. Average final score: Winners 36, Losers 17.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lindsey Vonn took all of 20 seconds to regain her former speed in comeback race at age 40
item.description: ST. MORITZ, Switzerland (AP) — Maybe it was nerves for her first World Cup race back in nearly six years. Maybe it was a bumpier course than she's used to racing on. Maybe it was some wrong lines or angles.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: John Wall gives broadcasting a try, while still holding out hope for one more NBA shot
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — John Wall was at the G League Winter Showcase last year, trying out, hoping to get back in the game. He did the same thing this year, without stepping foot on the court. The No.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Day 3: Winter Classic Basketball
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Palisade High School was buzzing on Day 3 of the Winter Classic as the Fruita Wildcats faced off against the Palmer Ridge Bears. Fruita entered the game riding high after a recent win against Ponderosa, while Palmer Ridge looked to snap a three-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Rickey Henderson, MLB's all-time stolen base leader, dies at 65: reports
item.description: Rickey Henderson, the man who changed Major League Baseball with his blazing, unbeatable speed, has died, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls face the Celtics on 3-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (21-6, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-15, ninth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago will look to keep its three-game win streak going when the Bulls take on Boston.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Pro pickleball players now earn more than WNBA, NWSL players
item.description: (KRON) -- The pickleball craze that's swept across the Bay Area and nation in recent years has apparently paid off, especially for female athletes. According to the Professional Pickleball Association, pro female players on the PPA Tour earned an average of $260,000 in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: American competitive eater Joey Chestnut named Holiday Bowl Parade Grand Marshall
item.description: World-famous competitive eater Joey Chestnut has been chosen as the 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl "Chief Eggnog Official." He will also serve as the Grand Marshal of the Holiday Bowl Parade.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Vucevic scores 24 points as Bulls hold off Raptors 122-121 for 4th win in 6 games
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 24 points, Coby White added 19 and the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Toronto Raptors 122-121 on Monday night for their fourth win in six games.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers suspend De'Vondre Campbell for 3 games
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers have suspended linebacker De'Vondre Campbell after he refused to play in Thursday’s game against the Los Angeles Rams, General Manager John Lynch announced Monday. The suspension is for the team's final three games of the season.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4
